analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral congratulatory note on International Peace Day, mentioning Russia and Cambodia appreciating peace and wishing younger generations to enjoy peacetime. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not referenced or implied. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – no mention of multipolarity, BRICS, or alternative order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – the tweet expresses a general peace wish and associates Russia with valuing peace, but it does not present Russia as acting, partnering, mediating, or contributing to peace or development; it’s ceremonial rather than evidencing benevolence. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – no historical reference. RU5 (Russia at forefront) – no claims of success or leadership. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage) – not applicable. Conclusion: No listed strategic narrative is explicitly promoted.
